prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(mark_equipment_as_candidate primary_tool_alpha)
(propose_raw_material_for_equipment primary_tool_alpha raw_material_iron_ore)
(reserve_subcomponent_for_equipment primary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(confirm_equipment_selection primary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(mark_material_category_for_primary_tool primary_tool_alpha material_category_metal subcomponent_core_plate)
(reserve_attachment_piece_for_equipment primary_tool_alpha attachment_plate_standard)
(allocate_material_category_with_attachment_for_primary_tool primary_tool_alpha material_category_metal attachment_plate_standard)
(release_subcomponent_from_equipment primary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(release_attachment_from_equipment primary_tool_alpha attachment_plate_standard)
(mark_equipment_as_candidate secondary_tool_alpha)
(propose_raw_material_for_equipment secondary_tool_alpha raw_material_copper_ore)
(reserve_subcomponent_for_equipment secondary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(confirm_equipment_selection secondary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(reserve_consumable_for_secondary_tool_variant secondary_tool_alpha material_variant_high_grade consumable_bundle_small_pack)
(commit_consumable_and_mark_secondary_tool_variant secondary_tool_alpha material_variant_high_grade subcomponent_core_plate consumable_bundle_small_pack)
(release_subcomponent_from_equipment secondary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(craft_upgrade_module_standard primary_tool_alpha secondary_tool_alpha material_category_metal material_variant_high_grade upgrade_module_prototype)
(reserve_subcomponent_for_equipment primary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(finalize_upgrade_module upgrade_module_prototype primary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(mark_primary_tool_ready_for_preservative primary_tool_alpha upgrade_module_prototype)
(apply_preservative_to_equipment primary_tool_alpha preservative_pack_basic subcomponent_core_plate)
(apply_upgrade_to_primary_tool primary_tool_alpha raw_material_iron_ore preservative_pack_basic)
(release_subcomponent_from_equipment primary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(reserve_subcomponent_for_equipment secondary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(mark_secondary_tool_ready_for_preservative secondary_tool_alpha upgrade_module_prototype)
(apply_preservative_to_equipment secondary_tool_alpha preservative_pack_basic subcomponent_core_plate)
(apply_upgrade_to_secondary_tool secondary_tool_alpha raw_material_copper_ore preservative_pack_basic)
(release_subcomponent_from_equipment secondary_tool_alpha subcomponent_core_plate)
(mark_equipment_as_candidate auxiliary_tool_frame_a)
(propose_raw_material_for_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_a raw_material_iron_ore)
(reserve_subcomponent_for_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_a subcomponent_core_plate)
(confirm_equipment_selection auxiliary_tool_frame_a subcomponent_core_plate)
(reserve_attachment_piece_for_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_plate_standard)
(reserve_attachment_type_a_for_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_type_a_standard)
(reserve_attachment_type_c_for_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_type_c_rare)
(bind_blueprint_to_module_for_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_a upgrade_blueprint_alpha upgrade_module_prototype)
(prepare_aux_tool_with_blueprint_and_module auxiliary_tool_frame_a upgrade_blueprint_alpha upgrade_module_prototype subcomponent_core_plate)
(prepare_aux_tool_with_attachment_a_stage1 auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_type_a_standard attachment_plate_standard upgrade_blueprint_alpha upgrade_module_prototype)
(verify_aux_tool_attachment_stage1 auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_type_c_rare upgrade_blueprint_alpha upgrade_module_prototype)
(finalize_aux_tool_slot_verification auxiliary_tool_frame_a)
(apply_preservative_to_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_a preservative_pack_basic subcomponent_core_plate)
(apply_upgrade_to_auxiliary_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_a raw_material_iron_ore preservative_pack_basic)
(release_subcomponent_from_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_a subcomponent_core_plate)
(release_attachment_from_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_plate_standard)
(release_attachment_type_a_from_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_type_a_standard)
(release_attachment_type_c_from_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_a attachment_type_c_rare)
(mark_equipment_as_candidate auxiliary_tool_frame_b)
(propose_raw_material_for_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_b raw_material_iron_ore)
(reserve_subcomponent_for_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_b subcomponent_core_plate)
(confirm_equipment_selection auxiliary_tool_frame_b subcomponent_core_plate)
(reserve_attachment_piece_for_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_b attachment_plate_standard)
(reserve_attachment_type_a_for_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_b attachment_type_a_standard)
(reserve_attachment_type_c_for_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_b attachment_type_c_rare)
(bind_blueprint_to_module_for_aux_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_b upgrade_blueprint_beta upgrade_module_prototype)
(prepare_aux_tool_with_blueprint_and_module auxiliary_tool_frame_b upgrade_blueprint_beta upgrade_module_prototype subcomponent_core_plate)
(prepare_aux_tool_with_attachment_a_stage1 auxiliary_tool_frame_b attachment_type_a_standard attachment_plate_standard upgrade_blueprint_beta upgrade_module_prototype)
(verify_aux_tool_attachment_stage1 auxiliary_tool_frame_b attachment_type_c_rare upgrade_blueprint_beta upgrade_module_prototype)
(finalize_aux_tool_slot_verification auxiliary_tool_frame_b)
(apply_preservative_to_equipment auxiliary_tool_frame_b preservative_pack_basic subcomponent_core_plate)
(apply_upgrade_to_auxiliary_tool auxiliary_tool_frame_b raw_material_iron_ore preservative_pack_basic)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves upgrading four pieces of equipment: primary_tool_alpha, secondary_tool_alpha, auxiliary_tool_frame_a, and auxiliary_tool_frame_b. The goal is to have (equipment_upgrade_applied) for all of them.


## Evaluating Equipment Upgrades  
- The task is to upgrade four specific pieces of equipment: primary_tool_alpha, secondary_tool_alpha, auxiliary_tool_frame_a, and auxiliary_tool_frame_b.  
- The goal is to ensure the upgrade, referred to as equipment_upgrade_applied, is completed for all listed items.

## Examining Subcomponent Availability  
- Only one subcomponent_core_plate and one attachment_plate_standard exist for four equipment upgrades.  
- Actions like reserving subcomponents make them unavailable, suggesting sequential processing rather than simultaneous upgrades.  

## Reviewing Upgrade Process  
- The apply_upgrade action releases raw_material and preservative but keeps subcomponents and attachments reserved.  
- For primary and secondary tools, special material categories and variants influence readiness for preservative application.  

## Analyzing Equipment Readiness  
- Equipment readiness for preservative requires subcomponent reservation and varies by type (e.g., mark_primary_tool_ready_for_preservative for primary tools).  
- Upgrade_module_prototype and consumable bundles are needed, with crafting potentially shared across upgrades.

## Analyzing Upgrade Paths  
- For primary and secondary tools, two paths to category_confirmed exist: one using attachment_plate_standard via allocate_material_category_with_attachment, and another using consumable_bundle_small_pack via reserve_consumable_for_primary_tool_category and commit_consumable_and_mark.  
- The attachment path sets primary_tool_local_ready and category_confirmed, while the consumable path temporarily reserves consumable, later releasing it after confirmation.  

## Checking Resource Constraints  
- With only one consumable_bundle_small_pack and one attachment_plate_standard, likely one equipment uses attachment, another uses consumable, due to shared resource limits.  
- Craft_upgrade_module_standard requires both primary and secondary tools to be local_ready, marked, and confirmed, while other variants allow for partial readiness.  

## Exploring Auxiliary Tool Upgrades  
- Auxiliary tools follow similar initial steps (candidate, raw proposal, subcomponent reservation, confirm) but may use different attachment types (a, b, c) instead of attachment_piece_standard.  
- Shared subcomponent_core_plate availability suggests sequential processing, as upgrading one equipment blocks subcomponent reservation for others.  

## Assessing Subcomponent Management  
- Subcomponent reservation is equipment-specific and persistent after upgrade, with no release during apply_upgrade, complicating simultaneous upgrades.  
- To process multiple upgrades, subcomponent must be released (e.g., via release_subcomponent_from_equipment) between equipment, ensuring availability for subsequent steps like apply_preservative.

## Exploring Auxiliary Tool Upgrades  
- Auxiliary tools, like auxiliary_tool_frame_a and _b, follow initial steps: candidate selection, raw material proposal, subcomponent reservation, and confirmation.  
- Different paths (finalize_aux_tool_slot_verification, activation, or attachment_confirmation) lead to readiness for preservative, depending on options like option_flag_1 and option_flag_2.  

## Examining Blueprint Binding  
- Binding blueprints to modules for aux tools requires equipment_selection_confirmed, compatible module, and available blueprints, setting activated and bound states.  
- Two blueprints (alpha, beta) are available, each bound to one aux tool, ensuring compatibility for upgrades.  

## Checking Attachment Usage  
- Auxiliary tools also use attachment_piece_standard, reserved after confirmation via reserve_attachment_piece_for_equipment.  
- Preparation stages (stage1 or stage2) depend on option_flag_2, requiring type_a reserved and attachment_piece, setting attachment_type_b_reserved_state.  

## Analyzing Verification Stages  
- Verification stages (1-4) vary by flags: stage1 (no flags) requires type_c reserved, while others set slot_modifier_applied or slot_applied based on flag combinations.  
- If slot_applied, binding slot modifiers and activating aux slots requires compatible primary/secondary tools confirmed and subcomponent reserved, leading to finalized installation.

## Managing Secondary Tool Preparation  
- Secondary tools, like secondary_tool_alpha, require raw materials (e.g., copper ore) and subcomponent reservation for upgrades.  
- Confirmation involves releasing attachments from primary tools (e.g., primary_tool_alpha) to free them for secondary use, ensuring availability.  

## Handling Consumable Allocation  
- Secondary tools can use consumables (e.g., consumable_bundle_small_pack) after confirmation, marking them as locally ready with high-grade variants.  
- Committing consumables sets secondary_category_confirmed, making both primary and secondary tools ready for crafting upgrades.  

## Coordinating Subcomponent Reservations  
- Subcomponents, like subcomponent_core_plate, must be released from secondary tools and reserved for primary tools to finalize upgrades.  
- This ensures primary tools are prepared and finalized, enabling readiness for preservative application.  

## Finalizing Upgrade Processes  
- Finalizing upgrades requires prepared modules, local readiness, and reserved subcomponents on primary tools, setting them as ready for preservatives.  
- Applying preservatives (e.g., preservative_pack_basic) to primary tools completes the process, reserving the preservative and marking it applied.

## Preparing Auxiliary Tools  
- Auxiliary tools (aux) require type_c_rare and must be confirmed with type_c available before proceeding.  
- Preparation involves binding blueprints and modules, ensuring no flag2, and setting b_reserved_state after stage1 attachment preparation.  

## Verifying Auxiliary Configurations  
- Verification for aux tools at stage1 requires b_reserved_state, type_c reserved, and no flags, setting the tool as verified.  
- Finalizing verification sets installation_finalized and marks the tool ready_for_pres, without slot modifications if no flag1.  

## Managing Resource Allocation for Aux Tools  
- Subcomponents, attachment plates, type_a, type_c, raw materials, and preservatives are shared but released after upgrades, allowing reuse.  
- Each aux tool needs its own reserved raw material (e.g., titanium or iron) and blueprint, bound sequentially to avoid conflicts.  

## Sequencing Auxiliary Upgrades  
- The process for each aux tool involves proposing and reserving raw materials, then reserving subcomponents and attachments in sequence.  
- After binding blueprints and modules, tools are prepared and upgraded, releasing resources post-upgrade for the next aux tool.

## Preparing Primary Tool Upgrades  
- Confirming equipment selection for secondary_tool_alpha with subcomponent_core_plate sets local readiness and allocates consumables.  
- Crafting upgrade_module_prototype for primary_tool_alpha requires releasing subcomponents from secondary and reserving them for primary, finalizing the module.  

## Applying Preservatives to Primary Tools  
- Marking primary_tool_alpha ready for preservatives involves ensuring subcomponent reservation, then applying preservative_pack_basic to complete the process.  
- Applying the upgrade to primary_tool_alpha uses raw_material_iron_ore, marking it applied and releasing resources post-upgrade.  

## Managing Secondary Tool Upgrades  
- Secondary_tool_alpha needs subcomponent_core_plate reserved again for preservative readiness, followed by applying preservative_pack_basic.  
- Upgrading secondary_tool_alpha with raw_material_copper_ore and preservative_pack_basic completes the process, releasing resources afterward.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
